message:
perf: Eliminate per-request Uint8Array copies for site-packages

Pre-create Uint8Array views of site-packages.zip (8.1MB) and
extension-site-packages.zip (3.3MB) at module load. Reuse the
same views across requests instead of copying 11.4MB per request.

The WASI shim never mutates zip data (read-only via zipimport),
so sharing the same Uint8Array is safe.
